hooks.command: f=$(jq -r "getpath([\"tool_input\",\"file_path\"]) // empty"); case "$f" in *src/client/*.ts|*src/client/*.tsx) cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}"; out=$(npx tsc --noEmit -p src/client/tsconfig.json 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then printf "Typecheck failed after editing %s:\n%s\n" "$f" "$out" >&2; exit 2; fi ;; *) : ;; esac
